This is a sweet bracer Though I play a monk as my main. I do believe this would be very nice for either a monk or a war. Who cant use 20 ac ) So if this droped while I was in Velks and a war won it I would cheer with the rest of the group ) As it is a very nice bracer

#Anonymous, Posted: May 22 2001 at 2:35 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) for one, we've got all of VL owned, for another, i'de love to see you try to make it past level 10, let alone high enough to make it to VL on a zek

QuoteReply
# May 22 2001 at 10:07 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Some guy thinks he's funny with his inane post on the dragon skin bracelet...

Anyway, this bracer is dropped off a rare spawn deep within Velketor's Labyrinth. I've led several raids in, but not that deep; he's within Velk's Tower in the heart of the Labyrinth. Extremely tough to get to.

Any warrior that doesn't have bracers better than this already by the time he gets there should get these by default because he'd be sooo amazingly poor, he would need all the help he could get. However, since I can't imagine any warriors getting that deep in WITHOUT having better, that will never happen.

QuoteReply
# May 22 2001 at 3:21 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965846855
151 posts
There are better warrior bracers, to be sure, but if a warrior in my group doesn't have a better one on both wrists, I'd fully support his right to roll on this. Particularly because its just those two classes.

Its a tad heavy for a monk, too, I'd hate to tie up more than the neccessary .1 on anything but chest, legs, arms, or shoulders. But its probably not too bad at the level you can get it.
